summary: LLM inference cost can reach approximately 2.50 USD for some tasks, although most Weco-Kaggle tasks stay under 1.50 USD in the reported GPT-4 Turbo pricing setup.
impact: Defines a limitation or failure branch that generated skills should preserve.

summary: Initial extraction split multiline Markdown list items and inferred the title incorrectly as `Methods`.
impact: Could fragment workflow steps and mislabel generated skills.
resolution: Merged continuation lines and inferred title from the first H1 or LaTeX title.

summary: The first source-map-aware audit mis-mapped section groups and incorrectly yielded unsupported rate 1.0 for all skills.
impact: Would erase the distinction between source-backed skills and abstract-only seeds.
resolution: Mapped skill sections onto source-note section groups before scoring.

summary: PDF form-feed characters shifted source-span anchors when Python `splitlines()` was used.
impact: Could mark valid line anchors invalid or point reviewers to the wrong spans.
resolution: Switched source-span counting to newline-delimited lines.

summary: AIDE exposed that workflow, validation, and failure candidate limits were too low and dropped data-preview plus LLM-cost content.
impact: Important operational and economic limitations could be omitted from generated skills.
resolution: Raised candidate limits from 6/5/5 to 8/7/6 and added a regression test.

summary: The OpenAI-compatible endpoint listed models but chat completions repeatedly returned account-pool or HTTP 503 errors.
impact: Live cross-harness transfer runs are prepared but cannot be executed yet.
resolution: Recorded prompt packets and kept live claims downgraded to offline readiness until provider availability recovers.

summary: Human-fidelity review packets and annotation summary are prepared, but all 18 score rows remain pending.
impact: The paper cannot claim expert-validated semantic fidelity.
resolution: Prepared packets, blank annotation template, and summarizer; kept human-validation claims out of the draft.
